subject: [DOC] Fix doc nit
commit_message:
[DOC] Fix doc nit

During a session demo, someone reported that the path for the
openstack configuraiton was wrong in the README
just fix this path

Issue-ID: TEST-289

Signed-off-by: morganrol <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
